info.description: You can use this service to search and retrieve data collection groups with data collection parameters, attachments, and custom data. Data collection groups contain data parameters that allow you to collect data values at various points during the manufacturing process. You can collect data for shop floor control numbers. You can also retrieve, create, update, view and delete data collection groups.
info.title: Data Collection

post.summary: Logs values for data collection parameters.
post.description: This endpoint can be called to log values for data collection parameters against an SFC at a given operation, resource and location.

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: request

200.description: Successfully completed the data collection group request.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and can not be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

500.description: There was an internal error somewhere in the call chain.

post.summary: Standalone / Non-WIP logs values for data collection parameters.
post.description: This endpoint allows logging standalone / non-WIP values for data collection parameters at the SFC level, bypassing the need for operation, resource, and location details.

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: request

200.description: Successfully completed the data collection group request.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: You are not authorized to access the resource.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

500.description: An internal error has occurred in the call chain.

post.summary: Upload a file with metadata for non-WIP data collection.
post.description: Uploads a file along with metadata for non-WIP data collection parameters. Only one file is allowed per request.

parameters.name: metadata
file
parameters.description: File to upload (only one file is allowed)

fileId.description: The ID of the uploaded file.

400.description: Validation error. File is empty or metadata is invalid.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

409.description: Conflict.The file is already attached to the given Parametric Measure ID.

413.description: The payload is too large. The file size exceeds 25 MB.

503.description: The service is unavailable. The file upload to storage or the file scan has failed due to technical issues.

get.summary: Endpoint returning collected data for SFCs.
get.description: Returns all the previously collected parameter data for given SFC(s) at the given operation and resource.

parameters.name: dcGroup.name
parameters.description: Data Collection Group where data has been collected.

parameters.name: dcGroup.version
parameters.description: Data Collection Group version where data has been collected.

parameters.name: operation.name
parameters.description: Operation where data has been collected.

parameters.name: operation.version
parameters.description: Operation version data has been collected.

parameters.name: parameterName
parameters.description: Filter results by a Data Collection Parameter name.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: Plant where data has been collected.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The resource where data has been collected.

parameters.name: sfcs
parameters.description: One or more of SFC(s) the data has been collected for.

200.description: Have successfully retrieved one or more Data Collection records.

204.description: Can not find any Data Collection records.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

500.description: There was an internal error somewhere in the call chain.

get.summary: Obtains a list of data collection groups.
get.description: This endpoint can be called to obtain a list of data collection groups in effect for an SFC in order to collect data against.

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: The Operation on the given SFC data collect against. Either this entry or stepId is required.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: Plant

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Resource at which data collection is performed.

parameters.name: sfc
parameters.description: The SFC to data collect against.

parameters.name: stepId
parameters.description: The Step Id on the given SFC to data collect against. Either this entry or operation is required

parameters.name: workCenter
parameters.description: Work center where data collection is performed.

200.description: Successfully completed the data collection group request.

204.description: The API call has not returned any data.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

500.description: There was an internal error somewhere in the call chain.

get.description: Retrieves parameters of SFCs based on the input filters. You can provide either SFCs or startDateTime and endDateTime. StartDateTime and EndDateTime difference should not be more than 30 days.

parameters.name: dcGroup.name
parameters.description: The name of the data collection group for which the data has been collected.

parameters.name: dcGroup.version
parameters.description: The version of the data collection group for which the data has been collected.

parameters.name: operation.name
parameters.description: The name of the operation for which the data has been collected.

parameters.name: operation.version
parameters.description: The version of the operation for which the data has been collected.

parameters.name: parameterName
parameters.description: Filter results by name of the data collection parameter.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: The plant for which the data has been collected.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The resource for which the data has been collected.

parameters.name: sfcs
parameters.description: The SFCs for which the data has been collected.

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: The current page of the record. Page number starts from 0.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The page size determines the number of records to be displayed in a single page. Default size is 20. Threshold is 50.

parameters.name: startDateTime
parameters.description: The start date time for which you need to retrieve the data. Define the value in yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ format.

parameters.name: endDateTime
parameters.description: The end date time for which you need to retrieve the data. Define the value in yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ format.

200.description: The data collection parameters are successfully retrieved.

400.description: The request body contains wrong format or invalid elements that cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related element is missing.

500.description: Internal server error. The operation you had requested led to an error during execution.

get.summary: Retrieves the measured Non-WIP data collection parameters.
get.description: Retrieves the measured Non-WIP data collection parameters for the given SFC. You must provide the SFC and plant details. By default, the results are sorted based on the fields: DC Parametric Measure ID, Created At, and SFC

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: The plant for which the data has been collected.

parameters.name: sfc
parameters.description: The Non-WIP SFC for which the data has been collected.

parameters.name: dcGroup.name
parameters.description: The name of the Non-WIP DC group for which the data has been collected.

parameters.name: dcGroup.version
parameters.description: The version of the Non-WIP DC group for which the data has been collected.

parameters.name: parameterName
parameters.description: Filter results by name of the data collection parameter.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The current page of the record. Default page number starts from 0.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The page size determines the number of records to be displayed in a single page. Default size is 20. Threshold is 50.

200.description: Successfully retrieves records of non-WIP SFC

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: You are not authorized to access the resource.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

500.description: An internal error has occurred in the call chain.

get.summary: Fetch the uncollected data collection parameters for the given SFC.
get.description: Fetch the uncollected data collection parameters for the given SFC for which the data collection groups are in releasable status and parameters in enabled status. The collective missing parameters for the given SFC will be listed.

parameters.name: sfc
parameters.description: The SFC to get uncollected data collection parameters.

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: The operation of the SFC being used.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The resource of the SFC being used.

parameters.name: currentOperationVersionOnly
parameters.description: Default true, the uncollected parameters are returned for current operation version. If false, the uncollected parameters are returned for all operation versions.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: The plant for which the data collection parameters are fetched.

200.description: Have successfully retrieved the data for all the uncollected parameters.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and can't be processed by the server.

401.description: You aren't authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Access to the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

get.summary: Fetch the uncollected Non-WIP data collection parameters for the given SFC.
get.description: Fetch the uncollected Non-WIP data collection parameters for the given SFC for which the data collection groups are in releasable status and parameters in enabled status. The collective missing parameters for the given SFC will be listed. By default, the results are sorted based on fields: DC Group Name and Parameter Sequence Order

parameters.name: sfc
parameters.description: The SFC to get uncollected data collection parameters.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: The plant for which the data collection parameters are fetched.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The current page of the record. Page number starts from 0.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The page size determines the number of records to be displayed in a single page. Default size is 20. Threshold is 50.

200.description: Have successfully retrieved the data for all the uncollected parameters.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and can't be processed by the server.

401.description: You aren't authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Access to the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

Content-Disposition.description: A header for specifying the file name, for example 'attachment; filename=file.jpg'.

LogRequest.description: Request to log data for a given set of SFCs on the same router using the given data collection group and it parameter values.
